surface.$description: Base colour for all elevation levels, representing the surface on which elements rest.

shadow.$description: Border colour used for the flat border-substitute shadow.

gradient.$description: Gradient colour for the flat elevation.

1.$description: Shadow colour for the first layer of the raised shadow.

2.$description: Shadow colour for the second layer of the raised shadow.

3.$description: Shadow colour for the third layer of the raised shadow.

gradient.$description: Gradient colour for the raised elevation.

1.$description: Shadow colour for the first layer of the floating shadow.

2.$description: Shadow colour for the second layer of the floating shadow.

3.$description: Shadow colour for the third layer of the floating shadow.

gradient.$description: Gradient colour for the floating elevation.

1.$description: Shadow colour for the first layer of the overlay shadow.

2.$description: Shadow colour for the second layer of the overlay shadow.

3.$description: Shadow colour for the third layer of the overlay shadow.

gradient.$description: Gradient colour for the overlay elevation.

1.$description: Shadow colour for the first layer of the extension1 shadow.

2.$description: Shadow colour for the second layer of the extension1 shadow.

3.$description: Shadow colour for the third layer of the extension1 shadow.

gradient.$description: Gradient colour for the extension1 elevation.

1.$description: Shadow colour for the first layer of the extension2 shadow.

2.$description: Shadow colour for the second layer of the extension2 shadow.

3.$description: Shadow colour for the third layer of the extension2 shadow.

gradient.$description: Gradient colour for the extension2 elevation.

1.$description: Shadow colour for the first layer of the extension3 shadow.

2.$description: Shadow colour for the second layer of the extension3 shadow.

3.$description: Shadow colour for the third layer of the extension3 shadow.

gradient.$description: Gradient colour for the extension3 elevation.
